what_it_is: Score one interpretability method end-to-end against the P2 §1 ground-truth causal oracle and obtain a comparable faithfulness score (the same axis as the E6-1 leaderboard).

entrypoint.python_api: from tools.xai_study.compare.benchmark import run, oracle, metrics, tasks

method_contract.attribution: score for EVERY candidate cause (higher = more important); missing causes score 0; extra causes ignored
method_contract.S: optional Sufficiency leg (§0): predicts y under a held-out intervention; method-reported (benchmark cannot synthesise generically)
method_contract.M: optional Minimality leg (§0): parsimony / right-level; method-reported

oracle_interface.ground_truth_source: the committed Phase-B §R records' extra.cause_names + extra.oracle_abs_delta_per_cause (the EXACT |Δy(u)| intervention map, experiment_design.md §1); no ROM needed

metric_api.score_method: metrics.score_method(method_output, oracle, k=3, rerun_fn=None) -> {pearson_corr, spearman_corr, precision_at_k, deletion_auc, insertion_auc, faithfulness, triad{F,S,M}, FSM_composite}
metric_api.live_metrics_note: deletion/insertion AUC re-run the real ROM via an optional rerun_fn hook (off by default); formulas mirror the committed Julia scorer pilot_ig_vs_oracle.jl
metric_api.faithfulness_definition: F = max(0, pearson_corr(attribution, |Δy_oracle|)) clipped to [0,1] — the §0 F leg, comparable to the E6-1 leaderboard

regimes.content: content/colour output (∂y/∂u defined; gradients can work)
regimes.position: discrete sprite-position/index output (NAIVE gradient = 0 → only intervention/causal methods recover it)
regimes.ball_pixel: a content pixel on the ball band (Pong running example)

degenerate_excluded.why: oracle column is constant/all-zero within the conformance horizon (no probed cause affected that pixel) → correlation carries no signal; even a perfect oracle copy scores 0

bundled.oracle_copy: positive control — copies the oracle's importance → faithfulness 1.0 (validates the scoring pipeline)
bundled.magnitude_proxy: an oracle-free toy method (RAM-index structural prior) → genuine non-trivial score; the runnable demonstration

rom_handling.policy: SCRUM §7 — ROMs gitignored, used in place, never committed; benchmark needs none

output_schema: SPEC §R (out/<method>_<game>_<regime>.json with extra.triad.F so the E6-1 leaderboard reads it like any phase record)
self_check: python -m tools.xai_study.compare.benchmark.run --self-test (oracle_copy F==1 on all tasks; uniform at floor; magnitude_proxy finite F on pong/content; oracle interface corr==1; >=6 tasks)
